title: 10 Signs You’re Playing Defense With Your Own Life
caption:
Playing offense with your own formation is a choice you make every day. Or don’t.

These aren’t signs of a bad man. They’re signs of a man who’s drifting — and drift is always quiet until it isn’t.

Which ones hit? Save this and send it to someone who needs it.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #selfmastery #realmen #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don’t control him.
